# Identifying link farm spam pages

**Authors:** Baoning Wu, Brian D. Davison  
**Year:** 2005  
**URL:** https://www.researchgate.net/publication/200110931_Identifying_link_farm_spam_pages  
**Evidence type:** Search-spam detection research

## Claim supported

Link farms can deteriorate link-based ranking algorithms and can be detected through graph structure.

## Key result

Proposes algorithms for detecting link farms and improving ranking results through reweighted web graphs.

## How it supports manufactured traction

This source strengthens the argument that digital systems can be moved by manipulated proxy signals. Use it as evidence for the mechanism, not as proof that every campaign succeeds.
